stemHtml: You are cruising on the T9 or T253 in the NAT airspace. Which transponder code should you use?

options.a: You do not have a code due to no radar coverage.
options.b: You shall use the code that Shanwick gave you.
options.c: You use the code 2000 with mode A/C engaged.
options.d: The last assigned code prior to entry into NAT airspace.
